name: GPT-5.6 Terra
archDisplay: Undisclosed architecture (presumed dense transformer); mid 'durable capability tier' of the GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna family, billed as balancing intelligence and cost
note: Mid tier of the three-tier GPT-5.6 family (GA July 9, 2026 alongside Sol and Luna); OpenAI positions the tiers as 'durable capability tiers that can advance on their own cadence' — Terra is the balanced everyday model between flagship Sol and high-volume Luna. Same 1.05M context, 128K max output and Feb 2026 knowledge cutoff as Sol, at half Sol's price ($2.50/$15 vs $5/$30 per MTok). Distinct model tier, not a reasoning-effort configuration of Sol (each tier separately exposes its own effort settings).
